question:
def move_one_ball(arr):
    """We have an array 'arr' of N integers arr[1], arr[2], ..., arr[N].The
    numbers in the array will be randomly ordered. Your task is to determine if
    it is possible to get an array sorted in non-decreasing order by performing 
    the following operation on the given array:
        You are allowed to perform right shift operation any number of times.
    
    One right shift operation means shifting all elements of the array by one
    position in the right direction. The last element of the array will be moved to
    the starting position in the array i.e. 0th index. 

    If it is possible to obtain the sorted array by performing the above operation
    then return True else return False.
    If the given array is empty then return True.

    Note: The given list is guaranteed to have unique elements.

    For Example:
    
    move_one_ball([3, 4, 5, 1, 2])==>True
    Explanation: By performin 2 right shift operations, non-decreasing order can
                 be achieved for the given array.
    move_one_ball([3, 5, 4, 1, 2])==>False
    Explanation:It is not possible to get non-decreasing order for the given
                array by performing any number of right shift operations.
                
    """

trajectory.content:
Last summer, I had the most incredible vacation that I can still vividly recall. It all started with a spontaneous decision to head to the beach with a group of friends. We packed our bags with all the essentials: sunscreen, beach towels, and a cooler filled with snacks. The drive to the beach was filled with laughter and music blasting from the speakers, as we sang along to our favorite summer hits. 

Once we arrived, the sight of the sparkling blue ocean was breathtaking. The sun was shining brightly, and the warm sand felt like a soft blanket under our feet. We quickly set up our spot, laying out our colorful beach towels and umbrellas. The first thing we did was run straight into the water, the waves crashing against us as we splashed around like little kids. We played games like beach volleyball and frisbee, which turned into a hilarious competition filled with friendly banter.

After a few hours of swimming and playing, we decided it was time for a snack break. We dug into the cooler and pulled out a variety of treats: juicy watermelon slices, crunchy chips, and homemade sandwiches. The watermelon was especially refreshing, and we all ended up with sticky hands and big smiles. We even had some ice-cold lemonade that we had prepared the night before, which was the perfect thirst-quencher.

As the sun began to set, painting the sky in hues of orange and pink, we gathered around a small bonfire that we had set up. We roasted marshmallows and made s'mores, the gooey chocolate and toasted marshmallows melting in our mouths. We shared stories and laughed until our sides hurt, the sound of the waves providing a soothing backdrop to our evening.

One of the highlights of the trip was when we decided to take a late-night swim. The water was warm, and the stars above twinkled like diamonds. We floated on our backs, gazing up at the vast sky, feeling completely at peace. It was one of those moments where everything felt perfect, and we all promised to cherish it forever.

The next day, we went on a little adventure to explore a nearby hiking trail. The trail was surrounded by lush greenery and vibrant wildflowers. We hiked up to a viewpoint that overlooked the ocean, and the view was absolutely stunning. We took countless photos, trying to capture the beauty of the moment. On our way back, we stumbled upon a small waterfall where we took a refreshing dip, the cool water invigorating us after the hike.

As the vacation came to an end, we packed our bags with a tinge of sadness but also a heart full of memories. We promised to make this an annual tradition, and I can't wait for our next summer adventure together. The beach, the laughter, the food, and the unforgettable moments made it a summer to remember!
